title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.380 - False or misleading statements unlawful
text:
266.380.  False or misleading statements unlawful. — It shall be unlawful for any person selling, offering for sale or exposing for sale any soil conditioner in this state to make false or misleading statements concerning the beneficial effect of such soil conditioner on soil, plants, or human nutrition.
(L. 1965 p. 394 § 3)
